title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four Claude Code projects for developers to build: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche Command Center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an Internal Operating System. The content promotes Claude Code as a platform for 10x output and features BuildPartner.ai as a companion tool.
